policy_principles: When in doubt, default to the more restrictive policy.
Parents always have override authority but not below the COPPA floor.
13 is the COPPA boundary; 16 is the GDPR-K ceiling for some EU states.
Apple Kids App Store category compliance is the strictest filter and we comply with it for ages <13.
Earned currency (PP) is gameplay; real-money IAP and subscription are the surfaces that get the age gates.

frameworks.coppa: 16 CFR Part 312 — Children's Online Privacy Protection Rule (US, <13).
frameworks.apple_kids: Apple App Store Review Guidelines § 1.3 — Kids Category.
frameworks.gdpr_k: GDPR Article 8 — digital age of consent 13–16 by EU member state.
frameworks.family_sharing: Apple Family Sharing + Ask to Buy.
frameworks.google_dff: Google Play Designed for Families program policies.

features.label: Signup flow
features.rationale: Under 13 the signup wizard branches into the parent-email-plus VPC flow; 13–14 in EU goes through GDPR-K parental consent unless DAC is established at <=13.

features.label: PIN-only sign-in (no password)
features.rationale: K–2 graders cannot reliably manage a password; device-bound PIN is the right primitive for ages 5–7.
features.source: Product judgment — child-development literature; GDD §1 K–2 co-play.

features.label: Password sign-in
features.rationale: Standard password sign-in available 8+; 5–7 cohort is PIN-only.

features.label: Display name only (no real names)
features.rationale: PlayGM never collects or displays real names; first + last initials only at onboarding.

features.label: Parent dashboard link
features.rationale: Required surface for COPPA parent access + GDPR-K Art. 15/17 rights — always present.

features.label: Scout voice (TTS)
features.rationale: Pre-approved TTS lines, no open generation, no biometric capture.

features.label: Ask Scout — open LLM Q&A
features.rationale: Open-ended LLM responses for 5–7 risk content drift; 8–10 gets canned-response Scout via curated prompt template; 11+ gets full Q&A with sport-only system prompt and content safety guardrails.

features.label: Ask Scout — moderated (canned templates only)
features.rationale: Same Scout persona but constrained to a curated prompt template covering rules, history, current players in <=2 sentences with no opinions on controversial topics.

features.label: Card scanner camera
features.rationale: Image is sent to Claude vision, parsed card data returned, image is discarded server-side after parsing — no retention.
features.source: COPPA data minimization + GDPR-K purpose limitation

features.label: Trivia — easy difficulty
features.rationale: Default tier for K–2 reading level + concrete questions; available all ages.

features.label: Trivia — medium difficulty
features.rationale: Available 8+; default for grades 3–5.

features.label: Trivia — hard difficulty
features.rationale: Available 11+; reading level + concept abstraction calibrated for grades 6–8.

features.label: Reading level adjustment
features.rationale: Auto-set to age band on signup; parent-overridable.

features.label: Profanity filter
features.rationale: Always on, all ages, no override. Apple Kids + Google DFF content appropriateness.

features.label: Highlights video (YouTube-sourced)
features.rationale: YouTube age-appropriate filter applied at query time; content above caution threshold dropped server-side.
features.source: Product judgment + Apple Kids content appropriateness

features.label: Alliance text chat
features.rationale: Off entirely under 13 — open chat is the highest-risk PII-exfiltration surface; no parent override allowed below 13. 13–14 with human + automated moderation queue.
features.source: COPPA §312.2 + Apple Kids Communication Safety + GDD §17.C risk #2

features.label: Creator collab visibility (external profiles)
features.rationale: External creator profiles (TikTok/YouTube) are off-platform unmoderated content; surfacing them to <13 violates Apple Kids 'no external links without parental gate'.

features.label: Leaderboard visibility (display name only)
features.rationale: Display name only (initials), no real names, no real-photo avatars.

features.label: In-game messaging (1:1 DMs)
features.rationale: Same risk profile as alliance_text_chat — off entirely under 13, no parent override.

features.label: Pack purchase via PlayPoints (earned currency)
features.rationale: PP is earned currency, no real-money exchange — gameplay, not commerce.

features.label: Pack purchase via IAP (real money)
features.rationale: Parent-gated all ages; <13 requires per-transaction parent approval (Apple Ask to Buy or PlayGM confirm step on Android). 13–14 standard IAP confirm.

features.label: Subscription purchase (Starter / Playmaker / Champion)
features.rationale: Parent-only flow at every age 5–14: 0/0 + override-false means the kid never has this surface; subscription upgrade lives in the parent dashboard.

features.label: Streak Save purchase
features.rationale: Parent-confirm required <13; 13–14 standard IAP confirm.

features.label: Default weekly spend cap (parent-adjustable down only)
features.rationale: Default $5/week for ages <11, $20/week for 11+. Parent can lower the cap; cannot raise above the default.

features.label: Alliance contest (within own alliance)
features.rationale: Within-alliance, no PII exposed beyond display name.

features.label: Regional contest
features.rationale: Aggregated leaderboard outside alliance; capped at 10+ because 5–9 should not be tracking themselves against strangers.

features.label: National contest
features.rationale: Larger competitive surface; gated to 12+.

features.label: Championship contest
features.rationale: Real-stakes alliance-vs-alliance competition; COPPA-graduate ages only.

features.label: Location precision — city
features.rationale: City-level only for picking city-skyline header art. Never zip / never GPS for <13.

features.label: Location precision — zip / postal code
features.rationale: Zip-level enables team affiliation suggestions + local contest matching. Off by default at 13–14, parent-overridable on. Blocked under 13 (COPPA).

features.label: Ad personalization (behavioral targeting)
features.rationale: Statutory-floor blocked under 13 — no parent override allowed below the COPPA boundary. 13–14 default off, parent-overridable on.
features.source: COPPA §312.2 + Apple Kids 1.3 + GDPR-K Art. 8 + Google DFF

features.label: Third-party analytics SDKs
features.rationale: Statutory-floor blocked under 13 (Apple Kids prohibits 3p analytics SDKs for kids). 13–14 default off, parent-overridable on. We use first-party event tracking only.
features.source: Apple Kids 1.3 — no 3p analytics SDKs for kids

features.label: Email collection
features.rationale: Parent's email only under 13 (collected via VPC); kid email never collected. 13–14 may provide own email for password reset; EU users also capture parent copy.

features.label: Data export to parent
features.rationale: Always available — parent can export the kid's data record at any time.

features.label: Account deletion
features.rationale: Parent-initiated only under 13; 13–14 can self-delete with parent notification.

features.label: Reduced motion setting
features.rationale: Universally available — no wrong age for motion-sensitivity accommodation.
features.source: ADA + EU Accessibility Act + product judgment

features.label: High contrast setting
features.rationale: Universally available — visual-acuity accommodation.

features.label: Dyslexia-friendly font option
features.rationale: Universally available — reading-difference accommodation.

features.label: Sound effects on by default (toggle always available)
features.rationale: On by default; toggle always available — sensory-load accommodation.
